name: cisco_secure_web_appliance
explanation: Cisco Secure Web Appliance (CSWA) is a logs-only vendor security tile. The spec exposes only a `logs` template offering two collection modes (file tail of access_logs/l4tm_logs, or UDP syslog). There is no Agent check class under `datadog_checks/cisco_secure_web_appliance/` (no <name>.py implementation), no metrics endpoint, and no network probe. Enabling the integration depends on user-specific paths (where CSWA writes its log files) or syslog port choice, neither of which is discoverable from the wire.
notes: Pattern N (logs-only / instrumentation-only). No check.py exists; integration is a logs config + manifest only.
